issues.detail: Examples do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Implementation is limited to Python and Node.js, not universally applicable to all AI agents.

scenarios.name: Observability with per-user cost tracking and caching
scenarios.rationale: Treatment swaps base_url to https://oai.helicone.ai/v1, sets the Helicone-Auth bearer header, attaches Helicone-User-Id for per-user attribution, and enables Helicone-Cache-Enabled: true — all three documented Helicone patterns; baseline proposes generic logging middleware and an in-process LRU cache, missing the proxy-based zero-code approach.

scenarios.name: Per-user rate limit with automatic retries
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Helicone-RateLimit-Policy header in the 10;w=60;s=user form scoped via Helicone-User-Id and enables retries with Helicone-Retry-Enabled/Helicone-Retry-Num/Helicone-Retry-Factor; baseline reaches for tenacity and an in-app token bucket without leveraging proxy headers.
